description_long: This object is a stylized wooden tankard or mug, featuring a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves with a natural, slightly uneven top edge. The exterior is reinforced with three prominent, angular metallic bands that encircle the body, providing both structural support and decorative flair. A large, ornate handle shaped like a drinking horn is attached to one side, made from a smooth, glossy material that contrasts with the wood. The base is octagonal and appears to be made of the same metallic material as the bands, giving the object a sturdy foundation. The interior is hollow, designed to hold liquid, and the overall craftsmanship suggests a fantasy or medieval aesthetic. The object is visually striking, with a combination of wood grain, metallic accents, and a unique horn handle.
description: A stylized wooden tankard with metallic bands and a large horn-shaped handle, featuring a hollow interior and decorative medieval design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, the horn handle extending forward, and the full height of the metallic bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horn-shaped handle and the angular metallic bands wrapping around the wooden body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden staves and metallic bands, with the horn handle barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the horn handle fully visible, showing the decorative metallic bands and the open top.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metallic reinforcement rings around body and base
